steps.title: Find the compound subject
steps.content: The verb must agree with "The trefoil knot and the figure-eight knot." Two nouns joined by "and" form a plural subject. The phrase "each with a crossing number below five" is only a modifier and does not make the subject singular.

steps.title: Reject singular verbs
steps.content: Choice A is singular and past tense. Choice C uses singular "has." Choice D is also singular. The sentence needs a plural present-tense verb for a general classification. The answer is B.
